news.title: Economic outlook is worsening and Trump is getting blamed, CNBC survey finds
news.summary: The public is as depressed about the economy as it has been since the years just after the pandemic, according to the All-America Economic Survey.

news.title: Inside the Chinese fraud rings stealing billions from banks and retailers
news.summary: Chinese organized crime groups are making as much as $1 billion annually in tap-to-pay fraud schemes. The schemes target retailers and banks.

news.title: Apple dethrones Nvidia as world's most valuable company, ending the chipmaker's long run at the top
news.summary: Nvidia shares have underperformed in 2026 as Wall Street shifts to companies powering the infrastructure AI buildout. Nvidia is one of the biggest players in the cloud computing industry. The company is also a leading supplier of chips for the cloud.

news.title: Chinese automakers are taking on the UK — and many Brits are embracing it
news.summary: The surge comes as China's auto exports have boomed in recent years. China's appetite for new models has cooled as the country's economy has cooled.

news.title: Import prices post surprise gain as costs of goods from China hit highest since 2008
news.summary: import prices were up 0.3% for the month, as a drop in energy was more than offset by increases elsewhere. The U.S. economy is expected to grow by 0.4% in the second quarter.

news.title: Netflix is getting stingier with its viewing data, and Wall Street isn’t happy
news.summary: Netflix's stock is falling in the wake of mixed earnings and a new plan to cut back on the publication of “What We Watched” reports.

news.title: What it’s like to get end-of-life financial advice from a CFP who’s also a death doula
news.summary: A dire diagnosis can upend your financial plan, but you can set it right again. A dire diagnosis will upendYour financial plan. But you canset it right once again.

news.title: Netflix is spending big money on sports. Is the company making the right bets?
news.summary: Netflix says live programming helps draw in new subscribers. But investors have become disillusioned with Netflix’s broader engagement trends. The streaming service says live programs help draw new subscribers, but investors have been disillusioned.

news.title: ‘I don’t want to sound callous’: Why base your Social Security claim on life expectancy? We could die at any time.
news.summary: “The actual date of death ultimately affects only the surviving beneficiaries,” the company says. “The death of a person is not determined by the date of his or her death.”

news.title: Can former employers withhold money from your 401(k) when you’re laid off?
news.summary: There are two main ways to move money from your workplace retirement plan when you leave your job. One can cost you; the other can save you money.
